name: Chocolate-Cream-Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a large bowl and place the popped corn in it.
2. In a saucepan, mix sugar, water, corn syrup, and salt.
3. Cook over moderate heat to 240 degrees F on a candy thermometer.
4. Add melted margarine (margarine) to the saucepan; add chocolate pieces.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Slowly pour the hot syrup over the popped corn, stirring constantly with two forks.
7. Continue stirring until the corn is coated and the syrup loses its gloss.
8. When the mixture is cool, store it in tightly covered containers.
